summary: The document appears to be a design document for the vessel INDUSTRIAL FAME, including its technical particulars and equipment.
general_information: The INDUSTRIAL FAME is a multi-purpose heavy lift vessel built by Hudong-Zhonghua Shipbuilding (Group) Co., Ltd. and designed by Shanghai Merchant Ship Design & Research Institute (SDARI). It has a gross tonnage of 16,729gt, deadweight of 14,083dwt, and is equipped with two MacGregor cranes capable of lifting 900t in tandem. The vessel is classed by DNV GL and features various energy-saving devices and safety equipment.
